title: NG2 1LW, Cliniwaste Health South Limited: environmental permit issued - EPR/UP3909SG/V004
body: "The Environment Agency publish permit that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the variation notice and decision document for:   Operator name: Cliniwaste Health South Limited Installation name: Crossgate Drive Clinical Waste Treatment Facility Permit number: EPR/UP3909SG/V004  "
